articles.author: Erin Doherty
articles.title: Trump stretches ‘America First’ on Iran. His voters are going along with it. - Politico
articles.description: Still, his hold could grow more tenuous if the number of U.S. casualties rises and the war stretches into the summer.
articles.content:
The Trump administration has offered shifting explanations for the rationale and goals of its strikes on Iran, ranging from preventing the country from developing a nuclear weapon to regime change.
